/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/pipelines/cas_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/pipelines/mu_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/pipelines/mu_watch_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/pipelines/simple_cas_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/pipelines/ticket_faa_lock_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/pipelines/watch_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/servers/mu_follower.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/servers/mu_leader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdma.dir/src/servers/synra_node.cpp.o -o rdma  -libverbs -lrdmacm
